title: Claude Code Is Changing How I Run My Faceless YouTube Channels

transcript.text: My faceless YouTube portfolio generates 700k per year and I built it the old [music] way, but Claude Claude is changing way around it in real time. I built a set of five AI protocols that run my entire portfolio on autopilot. They analyze niches, find ideas for my videos, [music] script them, manage the pipeline in Asana, and even post those videos across all platforms for me.
